backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (StressReading, BreathingSession, MoodEntry, SleepEntry, VibrationCommand, UserProfile) and per-user storage with CRUD operations; includes authorization and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON file containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend pages and public assets.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes (colors, radius, chart palette, sidebar variables).
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the TRANQUIL app with PWA manifest link, iOS meta tags, theme-color, and a service worker registration script.
frontend/public/manifest.json: Web App Manifest for TRANQUIL declaring app metadata, standalone display mode, theme/background colors, and 192×512 PNG icons.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker that pre-caches the app shell on install, purges stale caches on activate, and uses a cache-first strategy for static GET requests while bypassing all ICP canister API calls.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all app routes, wraps the tree in ThemeProvider and Toaster, and implements an AuthGuard handling login state and first-time profile setup.
frontend/src/components/AvatarSelector.t: Grid component rendering six selectable emoji avatars with color-coded highlight styles, exposing the selected avatar ID via a callback.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Fixed bottom navigation bar with five icon+label tabs (Home, Breathe, Sounds, Journal, Analytics) that highlight the active route using TanStack Router's location.
Animated SVG-free breathing circle that scales and changes color based on the current breath phase (inhale/hold/exhale/holdOut) and phase progress value.
frontend/src/components/EmergencyCalmBut: Full-width red-to-orange gradient button component that triggers an emergency calm mode callback when pressed.
frontend/src/components/EmergencyCalmOve: Full-screen overlay that guides users through a 60-second calm routine (breathing, body scan, affirmation phases) using the useCalmRoutine hook, and logs a breathing session on completion.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky app header displaying the TRANQUIL logo and navigation buttons (AI Tips, Profile, Settings) with active-state highlighting based on current route.
A labeled 1–5 intensity slider component that displays a color-coded intensity label and dot indicators reflecting the current selection.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout wrapper that composes the Header, scrollable main content area via Outlet, and BottomNav within a max-width container.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Full-screen login page that presents the app's branding and feature list, and triggers Internet Identity authentication via the useInternetIdentity hook.
frontend/src/components/MoodSelector.tsx: Horizontal mood picker rendering five emoji mood buttons (Great to Stressed) with color-highlighted selection state.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time profile creation, allowing users to pick an avatar and enter their name before saving via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/ProfileStats.tsx: Displays a three-column grid of user stats (breathing sessions, average stress score, mood entries) sourced from a UserProfile object.
frontend/src/components/ReminderToggle.t: A single labeled toggle row with an emoji icon and a Switch component for enabling or disabling a reminder setting.
frontend/src/components/SoundTile.tsx: A tappable tile for ambient sound selection that shows an animated sound-wave indicator when the sound is playing and a muted indicator when it is not.
frontend/src/components/StarRating.tsx: An interactive 1–5 star rating component with hover preview and amber fill styling using Lucide's Star icon.
frontend/src/components/StressChart.tsx: A Recharts bar chart visualizing daily stress scores with color-coded bars by stress level (low/medium/high) and a matching legend.
frontend/src/components/StressGauge.tsx: Renders a circular SVG gauge displaying a numeric stress score and color-coded stress level (low/medium/high) with animated progress arc and glow effects.
frontend/src/components/TipCard.tsx: Displays a wellness tip card with a category-specific emoji, color styling, title, description, and category badge.
frontend/src/contexts/ThemeContext.tsx: Provides a React context for dark/light theme toggling, persisting the preference to localStorage and applying a 'dark' class to the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioPlayer.ts: Manages playback state for both preset sound IDs and user-uploaded local audio tracks, handling play/pause and object URL lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useBreathingTimer.ts: Implements a breathing exercise timer that cycles through inhale/hold/exhale/holdOut phases for configurable techniques, tracking phase progress, cycle count, and elapsed time.
frontend/src/hooks/useCalmRoutine.ts: Runs a 60-second guided calm routine that progresses through breathing, body scan, and affirmation phases, tracking elapsed time and per-phase progress at 100ms intervals.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout, status tracking, and identity persistence via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposed through a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile CRUD, stress readings, breathing sessions, and mood entries using TanStack Query's useQuery and useMutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useStressSimulation.t: Simulates live wearable sensor data (heart rate, skin temp, motion) with random fluctuations every 2.5 seconds and persists stress readings to the backend every time the stress score changes.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Nunito/Quicksand fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a calming OKLCH-based CSS variable palette for light/dark modes including stress-level and chart colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Analytics.tsx: Analytics page that fetches 7-day stress readings, displays summary cards, a daily stress score chart, an improvement trend message, and a per-day score breakdown with progress bars.
frontend/src/pages/Breathe.tsx: Breathing exercise page that lets users select a technique, runs an animated breathing timer, and saves the completed session duration to the backend via mutation.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page showing a personalized greeting, a live stress gauge fed by simulated sensor data, individual sensor metric cards, and quick-action shortcuts including an emergency calm overlay.
frontend/src/pages/Journal.tsx: Mood journal page that lets users select a mood, add an optional note, and submit entries via the useAddMoodEntry hook, while displaying this week's past entries in reverse chronological order.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: Profile page displaying the user's avatar and name with inline editing support, logout functionality via Internet Identity, and a ProfileStats component for stats display.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page providing dark/light theme toggle, reminder preference toggles (hydration, breaks, stretch) persisted to the backend, and a data export feature that downloads user data as a file.
frontend/src/pages/SleepTracking.tsx: Sleep tracking page where users log bedtime, wake time, and quality rating; computes sleep duration and displays the last 7 entries with quality labels and colors.
frontend/src/pages/Sounds.tsx: Ambient sounds page offering a grid of nature sound tiles and a local audio file uploader, with play/pause controls managed by the useAudioPlayer hook.
frontend/src/pages/TipsAndReminders.tsx: Page component that displays AI-generated wellness tips and toggleable smart reminders (hydration, breaks, stretch), fetching data via React Query hooks and persisting reminder preferences to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/VibrationControl.tsx: Page component for selecting vibration patterns and intensity for a simulated wristband, sending commands to the backend via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/utils/dataExport.ts: Utility that serializes a user's data view to a JSON file (handling BigInt values) and triggers a browser download with a timestamped filename.
frontend/src/utils/errorHandling.ts: Utility that maps backend errors to user-facing toast notifications, with specific handling for unauthorized and not-found error messages.
frontend/src/utils/sleepCalculations.ts: Utility functions for computing sleep duration from time strings, formatting minute durations into human-readable strings, and converting time strings to nanosecond BigInt timestamps.
frontend/src/utils/stressAnalytics.ts: Utility that aggregates stress readings into daily averages over the past 7 days and generates an improvement message comparing recent vs. older stress trends.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and animations for the TRANQUIL app, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for TRANQUIL tracking two pending feature requests: ensuring consistent color theming across all breakpoints and making the app fully responsive from 320px mobile to desktop.
